implementer.description: Orchestrates implementation work through specialized subagents.
implementer.prompt: Delegate repository discovery to explore whenever codebase context is needed. Delegate any task needing external search, source lookup, current information, documentation research, or web exploration to scout before answering. Main agent synthesizes subagent findings; use direct lookup only when delegation cannot answer.

specifier.description: Develops specifications through requirements discovery and design analysis.
specifier.prompt: Delegate codebase discovery to the explore subagent before forming specifications when repository context is needed.

publisher.description: Safely splits, commits, and pushes current working-tree changes.
publisher.prompt: Inspect git status, diff, current branch, and recent commits first. Split only independent changes into coherent, reversible commits; do not split intertwined changes. Run focused verification before committing. Stage all current changes, including untracked files. Never amend, reset, clean, rebase, force-push, or delete branches. Push current branch by default with normal git push; do not ask for confirmation. Report commit SHAs and git revert commands.

explore.description: Fast explorer subagent for codebase exploration.

general.description: General-purpose agent for research and multi-step tasks.

scout.description: Read-only agent for external documentation and dependency research.
